backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profiles, coin balances, deposit requests, tournament management, and admin operations with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five features related to fixing actor initialization and network connectivity issues in WalletDeposit.tsx with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components, pages, and hooks describing Free Fire battle-themed UI, authentication flows, admin panels, and React Query integration with error handling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, including color schemes for Free Fire battle-themed UI components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'TN FF BATTLE' and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with eight routes, React Query, Internet Identity provider, theme provider, and profile setup modal with authentication state management.
frontend/src/components/admin/AccessDeni: Access denied screen component displaying error message and navigation button for unauthorized admin panel access attempts.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminPassw: Password-protected wrapper component that guards admin routes with session-based authentication, requiring 'Niranjan@123' password to access child components.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositPas: Similar password guard component specifically for deposit management portal, using the same authentication mechanism and password as AdminPasswordGuard.
frontend/src/components/admin/DepositVer: Admin interface for reviewing and processing pending deposit requests with approve/reject actions displayed in a table format.
frontend/src/components/admin/DirectDepo: Admin tool with tabbed interface for directly depositing coins to user accounts and viewing transaction history, includes user search and selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/JoinReques: Displays tournament join requests in a searchable table showing user details, Free Fire UID, WhatsApp number, entry fees, and join timestamps.
frontend/src/components/admin/MatchManag: Admin interface for creating and updating tournament matches with dialogs for match details including player UID, WhatsApp number, and match time, plus searchable match listing.
frontend/src/components/admin/Tournament: Admin component for configuring tournament settings including entry status toggle, entry fee, match count, and match time with real-time display of current values.
Password-protected wrapper component that guards admin portal access using session storage and a hardcoded password ('Niranjan@123').
frontend/src/components/admin/UserManage: Admin component displaying a searchable table of all registered users with their ID, name, and email.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingBut: Reusable button component with gaming-themed styling, supporting primary/secondary/danger variants and small/medium/large sizes with gradient effects.
frontend/src/components/common/GamingCar: Reusable card container with gaming aesthetics, featuring optional orange/cyan glow effects, backdrop blur, and decorative corner accents.
frontend/src/components/layout/Layout.ts: Main layout wrapper providing navigation, background styling, content container, and footer with website URL copy functionality and attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: Responsive navigation bar with authentication controls, route links (home/dashboard/wallet/tournament/admin), mobile menu, and pending deposits badge display.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time user profile setup collecting name and email with Free Fire themed styling and form validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, handling both anonymous and authenticated states.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend API calls including user profiles, balances, deposits, tournaments, matches, and admin operations with automatic cache invalidation and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetryConnection.ts: Custom hook implementing exponential backoff retry logic for connection failures with configurable max retries and manual retry/reset capabilities.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with Free Fire battle theme custom properties, dark mode support, gaming texture backgrounds, and overlay effects for the UI.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider wrapping the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with password-protected access, tabbed interface for managing users, deposits, tournaments, matches, and join requests with pending deposit notifications.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: User dashboard displaying profile information, wallet balance, and tournament status with navigation to wallet management and authentication guards.
frontend/src/pages/DepositAdminPage.tsx: Admin page for managing coin deposits with password protection, featuring tabs for direct deposits to user wallets and user management functionality.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page with hero section, feature cards showcasing tournaments/wallets/security/leaderboards, and call-to-action buttons that adapt based on authentication status.
frontend/src/pages/LoginRegister.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication that auto-redirects authenticated users to dashboard and displays welcome message with feature list.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentAdminPage.t: Admin page for tournament management with password protection, featuring tabs for match management, join requests, and tournament configuration.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentPage.tsx: Tournament join page displaying tournament status, entry fee, user balance, and a form to submit Free Fire UID and WhatsApp number for tournament participation.
frontend/src/pages/WalletDeposit.tsx: Wallet deposit page with UPI payment flow, showing user balance, deposit amount input (₹5-₹100), and payment instructions with connection error handling and retry logic.
frontend/src/utils/errorMessages.ts: Utility functions to categorize connection errors and provide user-friendly error messages with suggestions for network, authentication, canister, and deposit-specific errors.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space (including Free Fire themed colors), container settings, border radius variables, custom shadows, gaming fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron), and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state document describing TN FF BATTLE, a Free Fire tournament platform with user registration, UPI-based deposits, wallet system, tournament joining, and admin panel for verification and management; currently experiencing connectivity and admin access issues.
